routes._comment: Homepage at /anaf/internet/ANAF/. ANAF runs IBM WebSphere Portal (Lotus / wptheme* CSS classes) — these are stable across IBM portal deployments and across page templates inside ANAF. We target wptheme* and the lm-dynamic-title pattern that wraps every portlet heading. Selector source: direct fetch of https://www.anaf.ro/anaf/internet/ANAF/ on 2026-05-02. Routes match the rewriting WebSphere does to URLs (the path begins with /anaf/internet/ANAF/).

extract._comment: Header logo / brand mark — stable WebSphere wpthemeLogo class. The actual is the only descendant with alt="[ANAF]".
Breadcrumb trail — wpthemeCrumbTrail is a stable WebSphere class. Each link in the trail is a direct child <a>.
Top navigation menu — ul.nav-menu is the page-wide nav, populated by the WebSphere navigation portlet. We pick its top-level <li> > <a> children only (deeper menu items are flyouts).

Portlet titles — every WebSphere portlet exposes its title in span.lm-dynamic-title. There are typically 3–4 visible portlets on the homepage (Noutati ANAF, Comunicate de presa, Transparenta decizionala, Structura ANAF).
Main content area — wpthemeMainContent role="main" is the canonical landmark. The renderer can use this to clip everything else if it ever needs to.
Footer — wpthemeFooter role="contentinfo" is the canonical landmark for ANAF / WebSphere footers.

routes._comment: Servicii Online inner page (the public-facing card landing for online services). The same WebSphere theme markup applies; the page exposes 4 "flip cards" (.cardi, .card, .card2, .card3, .card4) with anchors inside .card-back* that link to authentication, declarations, API registration, and non-residents flows. Selector source: direct fetch of https://www.anaf.ro/anaf/internet/ANAF/servicii_online/ on 2026-05-02.

extract._comment: Page title surfaced via the portlet's lm-dynamic-title span ("Inregistrare utilizatori" on this page).
Breadcrumb — same wpthemeCrumbTrail pattern as the homepage.
Service cards — every flip-card on the page exposes its destination via an anchor with class "btn brighten" inside .card-back*. We collect all four.
Card front-face titles — each card surfaces its label inside .container .content > b > p.
